comment: PRD-4 P0 (#58) native de-risk. ONLY the runtime-reflection gap the auto-fetched metadata repository does NOT cover: logback's Joran XML configurator invokes ConsoleAppender.setTarget(System.err) reflectively (DESIGN.md §7 stdout-hygiene config). The metadata repo ships the default System.out path, not the non-default setTarget. Every Micronaut bean / @Serdeable / @Introspected / MCP SDK type is regenerated automatically by the annotation processors at compile time, so it is NOT hand-shipped here. SAXParserFactoryImpl is needed to parse logback.xml at run time. Captured empirically by the s2 tracing-agent run; trimmed to the logback library surface so it is server-independent.
